name: Google Chat GIF
description: Search Giphy and post an animated GIF into an allowlisted Google Chat space.

giphyApiKey.description: Giphy API key. Falls back to env GIPHY_API_KEY. A Giphy beta key is sufficient for a personal bot.

rating.description: Giphy content rating filter. Defaults to 'g' (safe for a work space).

serviceAccountFile.description: Path to the Google service account JSON key (chat.bot scope). Falls back to env GOOGLE_CHAT_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_FILE (path) or inline GOOGLE_CHAT_SERVICE_ACCOUNT (JSON) — the same credentials the googlechat channel uses.

allowedSpaces.description: Explicit allowlist of spaces the plugin may post GIFs to (e.g. 'spaces/AAQAxxxx'). When SET it wins (empty array = deny all). When UNSET it is INHERITED from the googlechat channel's enabled groups while groupPolicy is 'allowlist'.
